name: Fig Jam Muffins
recipeInstructions:
For the Jam:
1. Rinse and drain figs.
2. Clip stems and grind or chop figs fine.
3. Add water to fig mixture, bring to boil, and cook until water is absorbed (about 15 minutes).
4. Stir in sugar, salt, and ground cloves; cook until thick conserve consistency (7-10 minutes).
For the Muffins:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and granulated sugar.
2. Work shortening into the flour mixture.
3. Add milk and beaten eggs, stir to blend.
4. Divide batter among 12 medium-sized greased muffin tins.
5. Make a well in the center of each muffin.
6. Fill each well with a spoonful of jam.
7. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for about 18 minutes.
8. Serve hot with butter and remaining jam.
